title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: A video overview comparing free AI agent frameworks and their capabilities. Topics include Autoresearch and AutoAgent for autonomous research, Claude's 3-layer memory system, Hermes and Openclaw self-evolution mechanisms, and the Crewlet multi-agent platform.
